opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg is cramping so severely even while I am lying down that it feels dead, and my chest feels heavy and tight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramp in my calf used to only come on when I walked, but for the last four hours it won't stop even resting, and now my chest has gone tight and heavy for the first time. My wife is really worried.

symptom_narrative.onset: the leg pain turned constant about four hours ago; the chest tightness came on for the first time today after walking a short distance
symptom_narrative.duration: the calf cramping on walking has built up over months; the constant rest pain is about four hours old and the chest tightness is new today
symptom_narrative.character: the calf feels like a deep dead cramp that won't ease; the chest feels heavy and tight, like a weight pressing down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — I can't put weight on the leg and the chest tightness frightened me
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the cramp is in my left calf; the tightness is across the middle of my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the leg pain is now there all the time even at rest; the chest tightness started with walking and hasn't fully settled
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps the leg now; resting no longer relieves it the way it used to
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement or walking makes both the leg and the chest worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've come over sweaty and clammy, and my left foot feels colder than the right
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: for months I've had a cramp in the calf when I walk that eased when I stopped, but never like this and never with my chest
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand or walk on the leg at all right now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure I've had for a long time
past_medical_history.how_managed: I was put on tablets for it but I stopped taking them

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high cholesterol — they gave me a cholesterol tablet too
trouble getting an erection for about the last eight months — I just can't get hard anymore
I carry a lot of weight around my middle

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I eat a lot of packaged and takeaway food and don't really do any exercise
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my wife is here with me and she made the call because she's frightened by the chest symptoms

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, frightened messages, with the spouse relaying detail

objective_data_offered.value: about 112 kg on the home scales
looks sweaty and pale, is sitting clutching the left calf and taking shallow breaths, visibly anxious
spouse reports his left foot feels noticeably colder to touch than the right and looks paler
he says he feels clammy and sweaty and that the chest feels heavy
